시편 10:1.content: Why do you stand far off, Yahweh? Why do you hide yourself in times of trouble?

시편 10:2.content: In arrogance, the wicked hunt down the weak. They are caught in the schemes that they devise.

시편 10:3.content: For the wicked boasts of his heart’s cravings. He blesses the greedy and condemns Yahweh.

시편 10:4.content: The wicked, in the pride of his face, has no room in his thoughts for God.

시편 10:5.content: His ways are prosperous at all times. He is arrogant, and your laws are far from his sight. As for all his adversaries, he sneers at them.

시편 10:6.content: He says in his heart, “I shall not be shaken. For generations I shall have no trouble.”

시편 10:7.content: His mouth is full of cursing, deceit, and oppression. Under his tongue is mischief and iniquity.

시편 10:8.content: He lies in wait near the villages. From ambushes, he murders the innocent. His eyes are secretly set against the helpless.

시편 10:9.content: He lurks in secret as a lion in his ambush. He lies in wait to catch the helpless. He catches the helpless when he draws him in his net.

시편 10:10.content: The helpless are crushed. They collapse. They fall under his strength.

시편 10:11.content: He says in his heart, “God has forgotten. He hides his face. He will never see it.”

시편 10:12.content: Arise, Yahweh! God, lift up your hand! Don’t forget the helpless.

시편 10:13.content: Why does the wicked person condemn God, and say in his heart, “God won’t call me into account?”

시편 10:14.content: But you do see trouble and grief. You consider it to take it into your hand. You help the victim and the fatherless.

시편 10:15.content: Break the arm of the wicked. As for the evil man, seek out his wickedness until you find none.

시편 10:16.content: Yahweh is King forever and ever! The nations will perish out of his land.

시편 10:17.content: Yahweh, you have heard the desire of the humble. You will prepare their heart. You will cause your ear to hear,

시편 10:18.content: to judge the fatherless and the oppressed, that man who is of the earth may terrify no more.
